serviceDescription.aws: Amazon FSx for Lustre provides a simple, high-performance file system integrated with S3 for fast processing of workloads such as machine learning, high performance computing (HPC), video processing, financial modeling, and electronic design automation (EDA).
serviceDescription.aws-cn: Amazon FSx for Lustre provides a simple, high-performance file system integrated with S3 for fast processing of workloads such as machine learning, high performance computing (HPC), video processing, financial modeling, and electronic design automation (EDA).

templates.title: Persistent - SSD or Persistent - HDD
templates.description: All-SSD based or All-HDD based Persistent Storage with optional SSD cache

cards.title: Storage settings
cards.helpText: You only pay for the resources you use. You will be billed for each hour that your FSx for Lustre file system remains provisioned. Such hourly billing will stop when you delete the file system.

components.label: Metadata IOPS (optional)

components.description: Enter the % storage savings you expect with data compression

cards.title: Throughput, Metadata IOPS, SSD read cache, requests
cards.helpText: Configure the performance characteristics of your FSx for Lustre file system

components.description: Enter the aggregate throughput capacity you want to provision. Each Amazon FSx for Lustre file system supports 4,000 or increments of 4,000 MB/s of throughput capacity.
components.label: Throughput Capacity
components.placeholder: Enter the aggregate throughput capacity you want to provision

components.label: Metadata IOPS
components.description: Enter the amount of Metadata IOPS you want to provision (6,000 or 12,000 Metadata IOPS).

components.label: SSD read cache
components.description: You can optionally provision an SSD read cache to provide lower-latency reads of recently accessed data. By default, FSx chooses a read cache size based on your provisional throughput. If you know the approximate size of your active working data set, you can customize the size of the SSD read cache to fit this active working set. If your workload is not latency-sensitive, you can choose to have no SSD cache to reduce costs.

components.label: User-Provisioned SSD Read Cache
components.placeholder: Enter the user-provisioned SSD Read Cache

components.label: info alert
components.content: 'Proportional to Throughput' comes with 5 GB per MBps throughput

components.label: info alert
components.content: With FSx Intelligent Tiering, you pay per request when you write data or read uncached data from the Intelligent Tiering storage class

cards.title: Storage settings
cards.helpText: You only pay for the resources you use. You will be billed for each hour that your FSx for Lustre file system remains provisioned. Such hourly billing will stop when you delete the file system.
cards.bodyText: This monthly calculation assumes that the file system stays provisioned for the entire month. For fewer hours of up-time per month, reduce the cost as per the calculations.

components.description: Enter the amount of storage you want to provision (1200 GB, 2400 GB or increments of 2400 GB)
